## Summary

Describe the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `venv`, `build`, `dist`, `release`, logs, or `__pycache__`.
- [ ] I ran `python -m compileall app main.py`.
- [ ] I tested the change on Windows, if it affects hooks, Raw Input, audio sessions, tray, or autostart.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.
